title: HispanoTagger
description: A mod to display the PvP level of players tested in Hispano TierList.
body:
# HispanoTiers
A client-side mod for Minecraft designed specifically for Hispano PvP servers that implement a tier system. The mod enhances the gameplay experience by providing real-time visual information about players' skill levels, staff roles, and cheater status.

## Main Features

### **Tier Visualization**
- Displays player tiers above their names and in the tab list
- Intuitive color system for different levels (HT1-HT5 and LT1-LT5)
- Format: `PlayerName | Tier` for maximum compatibility
- Anti-duplication system for clean display

### **Game Mode System**
- Support for 3 PvP modes: 🔥 NetheritePot, 💎 CrystalPvP, 🗡 Sword
- Intelligent fallback system when preferred mode is unavailable
- Priority-based tier selection (NetheritePot > CrystalPvP > Sword)
- Flexible visualization per mode with emoji indicators

### **Staff Detection**
- Automatic staff member identification
- Visual badges: Owner, Admin, Mod, Helper, Builder
- Color-coded roles for instant recognition
- Format: `PlayerName | StaffRole Tier`

### **Cheater Detection**
- Real-time cheater status display
- Active and expired ban tracking
- Visual indicator: `PlayerName | CHEATER` or `PlayerName | Tier c` (expired)
- Detailed cheater information via search command

### **Commands**
- `/hispano` or `/hispano help`: Display all available commands
- `/hispano toggle`: Enable/disable the mod
- `/hispano search <player>`: Detailed lookup for a specific player
- `/hispano status`: Display mod status and cache information
- `/hispano update`: Updates all databases (tiers, staff, cheaters)
- `/hispano clear`: Clear all caches

### **ModMenu Integration**
- Optional GUI configuration screen
- Toggle features: Mod, Tab display, Overlay, Particles, Icons
- Mode selector with live preview
- Fallback information display

### **Interface Features**
- Clean, colorful command output with Unicode symbols
- Elegant search results with organized sections
- Status display with color-coded indicators
- Professional error messages with contact information

### **Mod Utility**
- Helps quickly identify opponents' skill levels
- Facilitates strategic decision-making in PvP
- Shows staff presence for rule compliance
- Alerts about known cheaters for fair play
- Enhances the competitive experience with clear information

### **Technical Aspects**
- Developed with Fabric API
- MixinExtras for advanced rendering control
- @ModifyReturnValue approach for maximum compatibility
- Dual mixin system for Lunar Client support
- Robust MongoDB API integration
- Performance-optimized with efficient caching
- Automatic data updates with 24-hour scheduler
- Multi-version support (1.20.1 - 1.21.4)

### **Customization**
- Toggle individual features (tab, overlay, particles, icons)
- Game mode selection and filtering
- Tier color system configuration
- Optional ModMenu GUI for easy configuration

### **Compatibility**
- Works alongside TierTagger and similar mods
- Lunar Client full compatibility
- Fabric Loader 0.14.21+ required
- Java 17+ required

### **Version Support**
- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Minecraft 1.20.2
- Minecraft 1.20.4
- Minecraft 1.21
- Minecraft 1.21.1
- Minecraft 1.21.4

## Installation

1. Download and install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/)
2. Download [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Download HispanoTiers mod for your Minecraft version
4. Place the mod file in the `.minecraft/mods` folder
5. Launch Minecraft with Fabric profile

## Configuration

Configuration file is located at: `.minecraft/config/hispanotiers.json`

The mod also supports [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for in-game configuration.

## Support

For bugs or issues, contact: **@Vayju**

## Credits

Developed for the Hispano PvP community.
